arts.ttl: Barcelona Lead Race for Inter and Juventus Target Tah
arts.sum: Inter and Juventus are falling behind in the fray to sign Jonathan Tah on a free transfer, while Barcelona are making strides thanks to a recent meeting with his agent. Bayern Munich are squarely in contention as well, as they have been after him for years. The post Barcelona Lead Race for Inter and Juventus Target Tah appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Donnarumma Facing Uncertain Future, Inter Move Unlikely
arts.sum: Gianluigi Donnarumma might switch sides in the next couple of years, as PSG have decided to halt the negotiation to renew his contract, which runs until 2026. He hasn’t had a great season so far. The French side spent for a new goalie last summer. The post Donnarumma Facing Uncertain Future, Inter Move Unlikely appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Inter vs. Parma to kick off matchday 15
arts.sum: Henrikh Mkhitaryan has scored three goals against Parma in Serie A, his joint-most against an opponent (three goals also against Genoa and Inter); indeed, in both of his matches against the Gialloblù he has been involved in two goals (a brace in November 2020 and a goal plus an assist in July 2020). Inter have not won at home against Parma in Serie A since 21 April 2013 (D4 L1 since then); for the Nerazzurri this is their longest ongoing streak of home games without a win against an opponent in the competition.
